title: AI and its spin-off gains
description: The AI industry in the US is on a high, with three major upcoming public offerings on the table from Anthropic, Open AI and Space X hogging the attention and news. But users are increasingly concerned about costs, and developers are rushing to raise capital. When the effervescence abates, a reduced appetite for AI stocks may eventually see investors return to emerging markets. Can India benefit? The post AI and its spin-off gains appeared first on Gateway House.
